aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured data and relevant content. However, it lacks customer reviews, local SEO optimization, and detailed service information.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to collect and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Optimize website content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Ensure NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) consistency across all online platforms.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Totally Cool Heating & Air. This is a significant gap in local SEO.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or engagement on Google.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is not fully verified. The website lists the business name and phone number, but address and other citations need verification across directories.
action_items: Verify and update NAP information on the website and major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business directories.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.
Claim and update business listings on relevant local directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and local SEO optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for HVAC services in Austin, TX.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Set up and optimize a Google Business Profile and collect customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as a local authority by publishing informative blog posts, case studies, and customer testimonials.

page_title: HVAC Company - Austin, TX | Totally Cool Heating & Air
